member.name: T:SimpleShooter.Activity1
member.summary: Android entry point. Sets up the MonoGame view and starts the game loop.

member.name: T:SimpleShooter.Bullet
member.summary: A yellow cube projectile fired by the player.

member.name: T:SimpleShooter.CubeMesh
member.summary: Procedurally generates a unit-cube (1x1x1) centered at origin as a flat VertexPositionColor array (36 vertices, 12 triangles). No model files needed — geometry is built in code.

member.name: M:SimpleShooter.CubeMesh.Create(Microsoft.Xna.Framework.Color,Microsoft.Xna.Framework.Color,Microsoft.Xna.Framework.Color)
member.param: Color of the four side faces.

member.name: T:SimpleShooter.Enemy
member.summary: A red cube enemy that walks toward the player.

member.name: T:SimpleShooter.Game1
member.summary:
Simple 3D first-person shooter for Android.
CONTROLS Left half of screen – Tap anywhere to shoot Right half of screen – Drag to look around
GAME RULES Red cube enemies spawn at distance ~15-25 m and walk toward you. Each enemy takes 3 bullet hits to destroy. +10 score per kill. If an enemy touches you, you lose health. Reach 0 HP = Game Over. Spawn rate increases over time — survive as long as possible!
